# AAM Project

> AAM Project is a fast, easy and powerful configuration and aliasing format.

## Documentation
- [Introduction](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/intro.md): Core concepts and overview.
- [Getting Started](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/using/getting-started.mdx): Quick start guide for users.

## Language Reference & Types
- [Core Types](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/using/types.mdx): Overview of the type system.
- [Math Types](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/types/math.mdx): Mathematical structures and syntax.
- [Physics & Units](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/types/physics.mdx): How to handle physical quantities.
- [Time](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/types/time.mdx): Temporal data formats.

## Tooling & Integration
- [Official Rust Library (aam-rs)](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/using/instruments/libraries/aam-rs.md): API reference for Rust.
- [Installation Guide](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/using/instruments/libraries/installing.md): How to add AAM to your project.
- [IDE Plugins](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/using/instruments/ide-plugins.md): Editor support and syntax highlighting.

## Extension & Development (Internal)
- [Architecture](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/creating/architecture.mdx): Internal structure of the format.
- [Directives](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/creating/directives/schema.mdx): Using @import, @schema, and @type.
- [Validation](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/creating/validation/type-checking.mdx): How type checking and validation work.
- [API Standards](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/creating/api-standards.mdx): Rules for building compatible tools.

## Resources
- [Examples](https://aam.ininids.in.rs/docs/examples.md): Ready-to-use code recipes and patterns.
